pengaturan.title: Settings
pengaturan.subtitle: School system configuration.
pengaturan.menuAkademikDesc: Manage academic years, semesters, and start/end dates — used by attendance and report cards.
pengaturan.akademikSubtitle: Manage academic years and periods (semesters). Period start/end dates are used by the attendance, report card, and grading systems to define the time range.
pengaturan.infoPresensiDesc: the attendance grid shows columns from
pengaturan.infoRaporDesc: grades are taken from the active period
pengaturan.infoEfektifDesc: calculated automatically from the date difference (no manual input needed)
pengaturan.autoIsiKalenderTitle: Create/complete Odd + Even Semesters with typical Indonesian dates
pengaturan.confirmAktifkanTa:
Activate Academic Year {tahun}?

This will change the active year. Class, grade, and schedule filters will use this year as the default.

Data in other years will not be deleted.
pengaturan.confirmHapusTa: Delete academic year {tahun}? All periods within it will be deleted as well.
pengaturan.taTidakBisaDihapusTitle: There are linked classes or grade data
pengaturan.emptyPeriode: No periods yet. Add one below.
pengaturan.confirmAktifkanPeriode:
Activate period "{nama}" ({tahun})?

Effects:
• The grade entry form will default to this period
• Attendance will use this period's date range
• The previously active period will be deactivated

Already-entered data will not be lost.
pengaturan.confirmHapusPeriode: Delete period "{nama}"? The period is empty with no linked data.
pengaturan.periodeDataCountTitle: {n} linked grade/note records — cannot be deleted
pengaturan.pertemuanTitle: Meetings per subject if scheduled once a week
